refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Dynamic task scheduling and dispatch system.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and productivity reporting framework.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses FR1 independently; interfaces with DP2 and DP3 are well-defined and manageable.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for control algorithms.
Risk that adaptive control may not fully capture all operational variabilities.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 and DP3 tightly with DP1 to reduce interface complexity.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments and scheduling commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination and task scheduling; moderate containment of control logic.
Primary containment of adaptive control algorithms; minimal diffusion.
Limited relevance to adaptive control; mostly remote control.
Monitors safety alerts; minor interface with control logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive control algorithms are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure real-time responsiveness.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in integrating adaptive control with task scheduling in NGHE Solution.
Risk of interface mismatches on Telemetry and Tasking links.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions and ensure robust communication protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR (optimize equipment operation) with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minor diffusion risk if adaptive control logic is partially implemented outside Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment score, indicating good packaging of DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and validating control responses within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of adaptive control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface protocols on Telemetry and Tasking to reduce integration risks.
Consider revisiting DP integration with task scheduling and reporting DPs in next decomposition level.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignment meets criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: No significant issues detected requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Sensor data quality is sufficient for adaptive control.
Interfaces Telemetry and Tasking are stable and well-defined.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Potential variability in operational conditions affecting control algorithm performance.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype adaptive control implementation.
Interface compliance tests between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
